use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages
Marketing page CTA elements requiring attention
Modern interface button with smooth hover feedback
ai_summary: A sleek hover animation button featuring a smooth text slide transition that moves upward on hover with a clean dark aesthetic. The button uses mix-blend-mode for distinctive text styling, rounded pill shape, and bold uppercase typography. Ideal for modern SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool interfaces seeking polished micro-interactions and premium-feeling UI elements.
